title: Woolly Wonders (Better Sheep)
description: A resource pack that adds warm and cold variants to sheep
body:
If you **enjoy** this resource pack, consider supporting me on [buymeacoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magex_ya)!

![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6768ab11225ced7911b78bc9040d3d402e8dfd1b.png)

# About
Woolly Wonders is a resource pack that adds warm and cold Sheep variants for consistancy with Cows, Pigs and Chickens from 1.21.5! (because Mojang refused to add them)



# Features
- Adds two new sheep variants with a custom model and texture, dependent on the biome (Optifine)

   ![sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/433b6cf2c51aae85dbea746f7940a589761488ec.png)



# Requirements
![REQUIREMENTS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5565ec4f08401f848919a99ff1872b81d89e19d4.png)
